name: Database Connection Pool Exhaustion
description: Application fails due to all database connections being in use
root_cause: Database connection pool size too small or leaked connections
infra_fix: Increase DB pool size, enable connection leak detection

name: Downstream Service Timeout
description: Upstream service times out waiting for downstream dependency
root_cause: Downstream latency spike or network degradation
infra_fix: Add retries with backoff, tune timeout thresholds

name: Memory Leak / Out of Memory
description: Application process runs out of heap memory due to a memory leak or unexpected allocation spike
root_cause: Unbounded cache, leaked object references, or container memory limit too low
infra_fix: Profile heap usage, add memory limits with graceful degradation, enable OOM alerting

name: Lambda Cold Start Latency Spike
description: AWS Lambda function experiences high latency on cold start due to initialization overhead
root_cause: Lambda function cold start initialization too slow, large deployment package or heavy SDK loading
infra_fix: Enable provisioned concurrency, reduce package size, lazy-load SDKs

name: Cascading Failure / Circuit Breaker Trip
description: Failure in one service propagates across the system, overwhelming upstream services with retries
root_cause: Missing or misconfigured circuit breakers allowing failures to cascade across services
infra_fix: Implement circuit breakers with proper thresholds, add bulkhead isolation, limit retry attempts
